extraction_notes: Complete extraction from all 128 pages. All U-designators verified against schematic pages. X2487 MLB (MacBook Pro 13" M2).

ics.description: Main System on Chip. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. OMIT TABLE reference on pages 20-21.
Slave Power Management Unit. OMIT TABLE RMK Z3505. Bucks: 3SW4,5,6,8,10,12,12SW6/7,13SW5,14. LDOs: 4,9,9B,12,INT. Input: PP3V8_AON via SPMU 1S0S V2x pins
Master Power Management Unit. OMIT TABLE SBN 23024. Bucks: 0,1,2,3,3SW1,4,7,9,11,13,13SW3. LDOs: 2,7,8,9,9B,10,11,13,14,20,INT. 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON (VODMAN)
Main charger IC. Converts USB-C input to PPBUS_AON and manages battery charging. PBUS supply and battery charger circuit.
Generates PPVAON_PWR_EN from CHGR_EN_RVR via delay circuit (D5342/D5349). Controls SVR AON startup timing.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.14V) from PPBUS_AON via PPVAON dch1 VIN ISNS. f=1.25MHz. XMC260 inductor. Startup 4.7/7.5/10.5ms.
Produces PP3V3_S2 from PPBUS_AON via XMC710 inductor. f=1.5MHz. Startup <5ms.
TI SLVS04F410. Switches PP3V8_AON → PP1V8_S2 via VDDSW_1445. 150 ohm resistance, 1.5A current limit.
TI SLVS04F410. Switches PP1V8_S2 → PP1V8_S2M4 via VDDSW_1777. 100 ohm resistance, 1.5A.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left rear / debug port). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP1V05_UPC0_LDO). SPI ROM for firmware. CF400/CF401 decoupling.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same as UF400 for second port. CF500/CF503 decoupling.
eUSB signal repeater between ports and SoC. Dual port support. Powered by PP3V25_S2_100.
Secondary eUSB repeater IC. Dock connect support.
USB2 RPT control IC with ATCRTMR0 reset 1V2 L control.
Level shifts I2C between PP3V3_S2 and PP1V25_S2 domains for ATC0
Level shifts I2C for ATC1

ics.function: ATC0/1 and eUSB0/1 reset level shifter
ics.description: Sequencing: 3.3V must come up at same time or before system 1.2V/1.8V
Produces PP5V_S2_UPC (5.23V) from PPBUS_AON via PPVBUS_AON_PORT0/1_VIN_1SMS. XMF820 inductor. f=1.5MHz.
Produces PP1V2_USBC_VDDIO from PP3V8_AON_ATC_ISNS. Vout=1.21V.
Produces PP3V3_USBC_VDDIO3 from PP3V8_AON_ATC_ISNS.
Produces PPVDS5_USBC_CIO from PP1V2_USBC_VDDIO.
Additional CIO domain regulator.
Produces PPVD055_USBC_CIO (0.855V). Vout=0.855V.
Produces PPVD055_USBC_FIXED (0.805V).
Monitors PPVAON current via PPVAON_ISNS_P/N. ISNTGAIN_R, PPVAON_ISNS_22kUT connections.
Generates CHGR_RST_2N_R reset signal. Connected to CHGR_EN_RVR and PP1V8_AON.
Secondary charger reset circuit component.
Ceres SE. Powered by VDDOQT_S2, PP3V8_AON. I2C and SPI interfaces. SE_CTLR_FW_OALS, TP_SE_DPTGS connections.

ics.function: System Management Controller (embedded in SoC M2)
ics.description: SMC functionality integrated into M2 SoC. Controls power sequencing, fan, thermal, battery management. I2C buses on pages 49-50.
Display connector interface. DPISI DACS, I2C bus connections. On display connector power page.
Touch Bar (DFR V3) 1.8V LDO regulator. Input: PP3V8_AON. Output: PP1V8_DFR. DFR_PWR_EN control.
Touch Bar (DFR V3) 3.3V LDO regulator. Input: PP3V8_AON. Output: PP3V3_DFR.
Lid angle sensor disable logic. Powered by PP3V8_AON, PP3V3_S2. AMR hall sensors on page 82.
Carlow B0 silicon audio jack codec. I2C addresses: 0x38, 0x39, 0x3A, 0x3B. Powered by PP3V8_AON, PP1V25_MAME_ID.
Three speaker amplifiers. Powered by PP3V8_MAME, PP1V25_MAME_ID. TDM interface.
Integrated WiFi/BT module. Powered by PP3V3_S2_WLBT_1MS, PP3V8_AON_WLBT, PP1V25_S2. CL0xx front-end modules. WLBT_PWR_EN control.
First NAND package. Powered by PPVD5_MAME_NAND_VCC (via FL000), PP1V25_MAME_NAND_VCC, PP3V8_MAME_NAND_VDDL.
Second NAND package. Same power rails as S5E0. FL001 fuse.
Motion sensor. Powered by PP1V8_S2, PP3V3_S2. SPI interface with AOP.
I2C address WR:0x2E, RD:0x2F (7bit: 0x17). Current/voltage sense multiplexer for power monitoring.
I2C address WR:0x20, RD:0x21 (7bit: 0x10). Secondary current/voltage sense multiplexer.
Fan control circuit. PWM control via SMC_FAN_0_PWM, tachometer feedback FAN_RT_TACH.
